option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 """Test that main() can be called programmatically with mode and verbose parameters."""
import sys sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from experiments.validate_manufactured_nikolic import main
print("=" * 70) print("Test 1: Call main with mode='save', verbose=True") print("=" * 70) criteria, snapshot_errors, err_paths, snap_paths, err_paths_snap, en_paths = main(mode='save', verbose=True)
print("\n" + "=" * 70) print("Returned criteria:") print("=" * 70) for key, value in criteria.items(): print(f" {key}: {value:.6e}")
print("\n" + "=" * 70) print("Returned snapshot errors:") print("=" * 70) for key, value in snapshot_errors.items(): print(f" {key}: {value:.6e}")
print("\nTest passed! main() can be called programmatically.")
